mobile/components/TrendsScreen.test.tsx.reason: FTY-189 adds coverage for the goal-aware headline delta (color + narration across loss/gain/maintain, plus the unknown/no-goal-this-session case rendering neutral rather than a guessed default), range prose, human-formatted dates, and the non-color adherence cue, crossing the 1000-line test threshold; FTY-186 ratchets the baseline down after replacing the per-button range-selector assertions with the native SegmentedControl driver; +32 in FTY-209 for the adherence-retry-label accentText assertion across both palettes; +168 in FTY-188 for the adherence-card honesty states (empty invite vs. logged-but-uncounted 'N entries awaiting details' vs. loading→resolves regression guard) and their distinct screen-reader labels; +86 in the FTY-188 fix round for the range-change → loading-placeholder regression guards (stale ready and stale error content) and the distinct error-state screen-reader label; +34 in FTY-217 for the headline-value display-face assertion (tabular-nums, typeScale.title1) added when the weight numeral moved to ThemedNumber/DisplayText; +55 in FTY-258 for the floating-switcher bottom-clearance coverage (reserves at least `floatingSwitcherClearance`'s footprint; no tab-bar-style bottom fade); +78 in FTY-261 for the status-bar top-containment coverage (opaque backdrop sized to the top safe-area inset, rendered outside the scrollable content, sourced from the FTY-097 surface token in both palettes); +115 in FTY-265 for the visual-review `weight.sheet` seam coverage (opens the weight-log sheet on mount from the initial-state seam with no simulated tap, and the release/non-E2E inertness proof).

mobile/components/TrendsScreen.tsx.reason: FTY-265 adds the visual-review `weight.sheet` sub-state seam: registers the preset through the FTY-247 API, reads an E2E-only, isE2EMode()-gated initial value for the weight-log sheet's `sheetVisible` state, and computes the settled-marker testID (passed to WeightLogSheet, gated on the weight-entries read reaching "ready"), crossing the 750-line source threshold; +4 from merging main's FTY-264 side-effect import of components/trends/visualReviewPresets (registering the `trends.adherence_retry` preset) with its explanatory comment.

mobile/components/CorrectionSheet.test.t.reason: FTY-181 adds beat-2 (correction-saved haptic) coverage — fires once per successful commit (amount step, re-resolve, override), not on a server failure or a validation error — crossing the 1000-line test threshold.

mobile/e2e/launchMode.test.ts.reason: FTY-245 adds the saved-food Portion PATCH regression guard (the E2E mock's derived-item PATCH branch must handle E2E_SAVED_FOOD_ITEM_ID, not just E2E_CORRECTION_ITEM_ID) plus an isolation guard proving the new branch doesn't disturb the estimated-correction PATCH branch, crossing the 1000-line test threshold.
